message:
fix(build): Add explicit LLVM-18 library path for Linux linking

Zig's linkSystemLibrary("LLVM") searches standard paths but can't find
LLVM 18 at /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib. Added explicit library path and link
against LLVM-18 (matches the actual library name libLLVM-18.so).

This fixes the edgeboxc build failure on CI after WAMR AOT libs build
successfully.
